name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling, supporting OGG and M4A formats with smart time-slot management.
overview: Automated online radio streaming to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots. Streaming is active only during scheduled hours.

versions.changelog:
- Fixed playlist selection in schedule programming
- Improved API communication using native ApiClient (more reliable authentication)
- Added visible error messages when playlists cannot be loaded
- Continuous gapless playback using FFmpeg concat demuxer with -stream_loop -1
- Schedule monitoring every 5 seconds - kills and restarts FFmpeg when schedule changes
- Removed all Liquidsoap code (not compatible with Docker containers)
- Simplified architecture: FFmpeg concat playlist instead of track-by-track approach

- CRITICAL FIX: Added -re flag to FFmpeg for real-time pacing - fixes desynchronization between players
- CRITICAL FIX: Switched to track-by-track streaming - fixes playlist order and enables schedule overlap detection
- Schedule overlap: later schedule interrupts earlier one mid-playlist
- Playlist playback order guaranteed correct
- Removed random music / shuffle logic
- Streaming only active during scheduled hours

- Removed random music playback entirely; streaming only active during scheduled playlists
- Transmission stops when playlist ends; no music plays outside scheduled hours
- Schedule overlap support: later-starting playlist takes priority
- Schedule monitoring every 5 seconds during streaming
- Playlist selection required when adding a program

- Fixed native Jellyfin styles in schedule list
- Fixed Estado tab status
- Fixed playlist loading and auto-reload after save
- Fixed transmission interruption between songs: FFmpeg concat demuxer for gapless streaming
- Improved API calls using native fetch

- Fixed status refresh button
- Added Saturday and Sunday to schedule
- Time selectors now dropdown lists
- Fixed playlist order preserved using LinkedChildren
- Fixed Icecast connection stop
- Fixed schedule entries with listItem style

- Fixed checkbox overlapping text
- Form elements use Jellyfin native styles
- Cleaner schedule table and status grid

- Fixed blank configuration page
- Tabbed config dashboard: Configuracion, Programacion, Estado
- Stable config load/save via ApiClient
- Schedule CRUD with table editing

- Initial alpha release
- Icecast streaming (OGG Vorbis / M4A AAC)
- Weekly schedule programming
- Jellyfin playlist integration
- Audio bitrate configuration
